commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: The remaining blocker is a narrow code/test repair on the existing PR branch: reject credentialed Signal base URLs in the new container client and cover the redaction behavior.; Needs attention: The diff adds a WebSocket client and leaves a concrete credential leak path for credentialed Signal base URLs in container mode.; Review finding: [P2] Reject credentialed Signal URLs in container mode — extensions/signal/src... (sha=0c2ef461449e1b3675bfac6ba9a81fe06b954868)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Signal native/container adapter, a bbernhard signal-cli-rest-api REST/WebSocket client, `channels.signal.apiMode` config/docs/tests, a changelog fragment, and a plugin-local `ws` dependency.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main only uses native `/api/v1/*` Signal endpoints, so a bbernhard container exposing `/v2/send` and `/v1/receive/{account}` is unsupported; the PR’s credential leak is also source-reproducible with a credentialed `httpUrl` in container mode.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blocker is a narrow code/test repair on the existing PR branch: reject credentialed Signal base URLs in the new container client and cover the redaction behavior.

target.title: Signal: add REST API support for containerized deployments
target.author: hua688
